no service pad
service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime show-timezone
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime show-timezone year
service password-encryption
no platform punt-keepalive disable-kernel-core
platform management port rate-limt-enabled
!
hostname FRS-QRS-SW01
!
!
vrf definition Mgmt-vrf
 !
 address-family ipv4
 exit-address-family
 !
 address-family ipv6
 exit-address-family
!
logging buffered 40960
!
vlan 1 name   default
vlan 2 name     Gateway_VLAN
vlan 10 name    Workstation_VLAN
vlan 20 name    Voice_VLAN
vlan 200 name   MGMT_VLAN
vlan 300 name   Wireless_VLAN
vlan 350 name   Guest_VLAN
vlan 400 name   Facilities_VLAN
!
aaa new-model
!
!
aaa authentication login default local
aaa authorization exec default local 
!
!
aaa session-id common
clock timezone pst -8 0
clock summer-time pdt recurring
!
!
!
!
ip routing
!
!
!
!
!
ip name-server 10.137.2.10 10.137.2.11 10.191.8.6 10.191.8.7
ip domain name quinn.com
ip dhcp excluded-address 10.134.11.1 10.134.11.20
ip dhcp excluded-address 10.134.11.245 10.134.11.255
ip dhcp excluded-address 10.134.11.129 10.134.11.139
ip dhcp excluded-address 10.134.11.118 10.134.11.127
ip dhcp excluded-address 10.134.11.129 10.134.11.145
ip dhcp excluded-address 10.134.57.1 10.134.57.9
!
ip dhcp pool Voice_VLAN
 network 10.134.11.128 255.255.255.128
 domain-name quinn.com
 option 128 ip 10.134.17.5 
 option 129 ip 10.134.17.5 
 option 130 ascii "MITEL IP PHONE"
 option 125 ascii "id:ipphone.mitel.com;sw_tftp=10.134.17.5;call_srv=10.134.17.5;vlan=20;dscp=46;l2p=6;"
 option 134 hex 2e
 default-router 10.134.11.129 
 option 132 hex 14
 option 133 hex 06
 dns-server 10.137.2.10 10.137.2.11 10.191.8.6 10.191.8.7 
!
ip dhcp pool Management_VLAN
 network 10.134.1.112 255.255.255.248
 domain-name quinn.com
 default-router 10.134.1.113 
 dns-server 10.137.2.10 10.137.2.11 10.191.8.6 10.191.8.7 
!
ip dhcp pool Data_VLAN
 network 10.134.11.0 255.255.255.128
 default-router 10.134.11.1 
 domain-name quinn.com
 dns-server 10.137.2.10 10.137.2.11 10.191.8.6 10.191.8.7 
!
ip dhcp pool FRSQRS02
 host 10.134.11.20 255.255.255.128
 hardware-address 0800.37ee.43f0
!
ip dhcp pool FRSQRS03
 host 10.134.11.16 255.255.255.128
 client-identifier 0174.dfbf.1302.d1
!
ip dhcp pool FRSQRS04
 host 10.134.11.60 255.255.255.128
 hardware-address 0020.00a6.24e9
!
ip dhcp pool FRSQRS05
 client-identifier 0100.2000.a624.e9
!
ip dhcp pool Voice
!
ip dhcp pool Wireless_VLAN
 network 10.134.57.0 255.255.255.128
 domain-name quinn.com
 default-router 10.134.57.1 
 dns-server 10.137.2.10 10.137.2.11 10.191.8.6 10.191.8.7 
!
ip dhcp pool Facilities_VLAN
 network 10.134.57.128 255.255.255.128
 domain-name quinn.com
 dns-server 10.137.2.10 10.137.2.11 
 default-router 10.134.57.129 
!
ip dhcp pool FRSQRS01
 host 10.134.11.65 255.255.255.128
 client-identifier 01e0.73e7.218e.1a
!
ip dhcp pool FRSQRS06
 host 10.134.11.38 255.255.255.128
 client-identifier 0138.ca84.3181.6f
!
!
!
login on-success log
!
!
!
!
!
!
!
no device-tracking logging theft
!
flow record WUG-In
 match ipv4 tos
 match ipv4 protocol
 match ipv4 source address
 match ipv4 destination address
 match transport source-port
 match transport destination-port
 match interface input
 collect interface output
 collect transport tcp flags
 collect counter bytes long
 collect counter packets long
!
!
flow record WUG-Out
 match ipv4 tos
 match ipv4 protocol
 match ipv4 source address
 match ipv4 destination address
 match transport source-port
 match transport destination-port
 match interface output
 collect transport tcp flags
 collect counter bytes long
 collect counter packets long
!
!
flow exporter WUG
 destination 10.137.2.74
 transport udp 7777
 template data timeout 60
!
!
flow monitor WUG-In
 exporter WUG
 cache timeout active 60
 record WUG-In
!
!
flow monitor WUG-Out
 exporter WUG
 cache timeout active 60
 record WUG-Out
!
!
!
!
!
!
diagnostic bootup level minimal
!
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree extend system-id
archive
 path ftp://COI-SRVR34.quinn.com/FRS/$h.txt
 write-memory
memory free low-watermark processor 79468
!
username quinn privilege 15 secret 9 $14$0IeG$qD8u2WM/mRQcf.$/69zVNZNiT.kJADZ.b6W3F0.Msn1HrVpmr0XZs/nDuo
username cdw privilege 15 secret Quinn24615
!
redundancy
 mode sso
!
!
!
!
!
transceiver type all
 monitoring
!
!

 no ip address
 negotiation auto

interface GigabitEthernet1/0/46
 description WAP
 switchport trunk native vlan 200
 switchport trunk allowed vlan 200,300
 switchport mode trunk
 ip flow monitor WUG-In input
 ip flow monitor WUG-Out output
 auto qos trust dscp
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet1/0/47
 switchport access vlan 10
 switchport voice vlan 20
 auto qos trust dscp
 spanning-tree portfast
!
interface GigabitEthernet1/0/48
 description Uplink to TPX
 switchport access vlan 2
 ip flow monitor WUG-In input
 ip flow monitor WUG-Out output
 auto qos trust dscp
!

 shutdown

interface Vlan1
 ip address 10.191.28.1 255.255.255.0
 shutdown
!
interface Vlan2
 ip address 10.134.0.25 255.255.255.248
!
interface Vlan10
 description FRS_QRS_LAN
 ip address 10.134.11.1 255.255.255.128
!
interface Vlan20
 description FRS_QRS_VOICE
 ip address 10.134.11.129 255.255.255.128
!
interface Vlan200
 ip address 10.134.1.113 255.255.255.248
!
interface Vlan300
 ip address 10.134.57.1 255.255.255.128
!
interface Vlan400
 ip address 10.134.57.129 255.255.255.128
!
router bgp 64610
 bgp router-id 10.134.0.25
 bgp log-neighbor-changes
 neighbor 10.134.0.26 remote-as 65001
 neighbor 10.134.0.26 description TPX
 !
 address-family ipv4
  redistribute connected
  neighbor 10.134.0.26 activate
  neighbor 10.134.0.26 route-map TPX-INGRESS-IN in
  neighbor 10.134.0.26 route-map TPX-EGRESS-OUT out
 exit-address-family
!
ip forward-protocol nd
no ip http server
ip http authentication aaa
no ip http secure-server
ip ftp username QUINN\CiscoBackup
ip ftp password 7 097E1D0D2E5547164A4D45
!
!
ip access-list standard TPX-EGRESS-OUT
 10 permit any
ip access-list standard TPX-INGRESS-IN
 10 permit any
!
ip access-list extended AutoQos-4.0-wlan-Acl-Bulk-Data
 10 permit tcp any any eq 22
 20 permit tcp any any eq 465
 30 permit tcp any any eq 143
 40 permit tcp any any eq 993
 50 permit tcp any any eq 995
 60 permit tcp any any eq 1914
 70 permit tcp any any eq ftp
 80 permit tcp any any eq ftp-data
 90 permit tcp any any eq smtp
 100 permit tcp any any eq pop3
ip access-list extended AutoQos-4.0-wlan-Acl-MultiEnhanced-Conf
 10 permit udp any any range 16384 32767
 20 permit tcp any any range 50000 59999
ip access-list extended AutoQos-4.0-wlan-Acl-Scavanger
 10 permit tcp any any range 2300 2400
 20 permit udp any any range 2300 2400
 30 permit tcp any any range 6881 6999
 40 permit tcp any any range 28800 29100
 50 permit tcp any any eq 1214
 60 permit udp any any eq 1214
 70 permit tcp any any eq 3689
 80 permit udp any any eq 3689
 90 permit tcp any any eq 11999
ip access-list extended AutoQos-4.0-wlan-Acl-Signaling
 10 permit tcp any any range 2000 2002
 20 permit tcp any any range 5060 5061
 30 permit udp any any range 5060 5061
ip access-list extended AutoQos-4.0-wlan-Acl-Transactional-Data
 10 permit tcp any any eq 443
 20 permit tcp any any eq 1521
 30 permit udp any any eq 1521
 40 permit tcp any any eq 1526
 50 permit udp any any eq 1526
 60 permit tcp any any eq 1575
 70 permit udp any any eq 1575
 80 permit tcp any any eq 1630
 90 permit udp any any eq 1630
 100 permit tcp any any eq 1527
 110 permit tcp any any eq 6200
 120 permit tcp any any eq 3389
 130 permit tcp any any eq 5985
 140 permit tcp any any eq 8080
!
ip radius source-interface Vlan200 
logging source-interface Vlan200
logging host 10.137.2.74
!
route-map TPX-EGRESS-OUT permit 10 
 match ip address TPX-EGRESS-OUT
!
route-map TPX-INGRESS-IN permit 10 
 match ip address TPX-INGRESS-IN
!
!
snmp-server view NO_BAD_SNMP iso included
snmp-server view NO_BAD_SNMP snmpUsmMIB excluded
snmp-server view NO_BAD_SNMP snmpVacmMIB excluded
snmp-server view NO_BAD_SNMP snmpCommunityMIB excluded
snmp-server community qu1nngr0up view NO_BAD_SNMP RO
!
!

 key 7 115113004436332E370731

control-plane
 service-policy input system-cpp-policy
!
banner login ^C
NOTICE TO USERS
THIS IS A PRIVATE COMPUTER SYSTEM. It is for authorized use only.
Users (authorized or unauthorized) have no explicit or implicit
expectation of privacy.
Any or all uses of this system and all files on this system may
be intercepted, monitored, recorded, copied, audited, inspected,
and disclosed to authorized site and law enforcement personnel,
as well as authorized officials of other agencies, both domestic
and foreign.  By using this system, the user consents to such
interception, monitoring, recording, copying, auditing, inspection,
and disclosure at the discretion of authorized site personnel.
Unauthorized or improper use of this system may result in
administrative disciplinary action and civil and criminal penalties.
By continuing to use this system you indicate your awareness of and
consent to these terms and conditions of use.   LOG OFF IMMEDIATELY
if you do not agree to the conditions stated in this warning.
^C
!
line con 0
 stopbits 1
line aux 0
 stopbits 1
line vty 0 4
 transport input ssh
 transport output ssh
line vty 5 15
 transport input ssh
 transport output ssh
!
ntp server ntp.quinn.com
ntp server ntp2.quinn.com
